---
title: "Session 10: Methodology: Reproducibility, LLM Limits & Ethics"
subtitle: "Day 4 · Methodology & Pipeline Assembly (4-1)"
format: revealjs
metadata-files:
  - _slides.yml
---

<!-- STUB DECK — structure only; content to be filled in before the course. -->

# Session 10: Methodology: Reproducibility, LLM Limits & Ethics

## 📋 Agenda

- Reproducibility — pin the model, log prompts, set temperature/seed
- LLM limitations — hallucination, data contamination, stochasticity
- Ethics — privacy, authorship — and the reporting checklist

## 🎯 Learning Objectives

By the end of this session, you will be able to:

<!-- to be added -->

# Reproducibility

## Reproducibility

<!-- to be added -->

# LLM limitations

## LLM limitations

<!-- to be added -->

# Ethics & the reporting checklist

## Ethics & the reporting checklist

<!-- to be added -->

# Any questions?
